export.description: Save your in-progress answers as a file so you can keep a backup or share it with your manager.
export.failedMessage: Unable to save a copy of your audit.
export.title: Save a copy of this audit

errors.accessDenied403: Access denied (403): you are not allowed to access this place or audit.
errors.offlineChangesSaved: {{message}} You appear to be offline. Changes are saved locally and will sync when you reconnect.
errors.submitNeedsUploadedDraft: Reconnect and wait for your saved changes to upload before submitting.
errors.queuedSubmitQueued: Your submission will be sent automatically when you reconnect.
errors.queuedSubmitFailedMessage: Your offline submission for {{placeName}} could not be delivered. Please resubmit or contact support.

finalComments.alreadySubmittedMessage: This audit has already been submitted. You can review it from the overview screen.
finalComments.helper: This is optional. Add any closing observations, recommendations, or context you want attached to the completed audit.
finalComments.incompleteMessage: All required setup questions and sections must be complete before you can add final comments and submit.
finalComments.missingItemsDescription: Sections with no answers are listed by section. Partially complete sections list each missing question key.
finalComments.placeholder: Add any final comments or recommendations...
finalComments.preparingMessage: Loading the latest audit state before final submission...
finalComments.prompt: Any final comments before you submit this completed audit?
finalComments.submitConfirmMessage: Once submitted, this audit cannot be edited. Make sure your final comments and answers are ready before continuing.
finalComments.subtitle: Leave any final comments you want saved with this completed audit before submitting.

executeLanding.emptyMessage: Try a different search or filter combination.
executeLanding.subtitle: Choose a place to start or resume the section-by-section COPA audit flow.
executeLanding.title: Audit Execute

overview.chooseMode: Choose what part of the tool you will complete for this place.
overview.placeNotFound: The selected place route is invalid. Return to the Execute tab and choose a place again.
overview.reviewDescription: Review every section in one place and jump back into the next incomplete section.
overview.sectionCardHintContinue: Tap Continue to pick up where you left off, or jump to any section below.
overview.sectionCardHintAllDone: All sections complete. Tap a section to review your answers.
overview.sectionEmpty: No sections match the current filter.
overview.roleFixesSubset: Your role already fixes the visible subset of questions for this place.

syncStatus.pendingMessage: Draft changes are queued and will upload automatically when the app is active and online.
syncStatus.syncingMessage: Saved changes are uploading now. Keep the app open until this finishes if you need to submit right away.
syncStatus.queuedSubmitMessage: Your responses are saved. The submission will be sent when you go back online.

setup.modeRequired: Select one execution mode before continuing.
setup.subtitle: Review how the tool works, then choose the role that best matches how you will complete this audit.
setup.roleQuestion: What is your role with respect to this playspace?
setup.preambleTitle: Rewiew important info, before you begin

auditInfo.modeMissingMessage: Go back to the preamble step and choose how you will complete this audit before continuing.
auditInfo.preparingMessage: Loading the generated audit details and current setup state...
auditInfo.subtitle: Review the generated audit metadata before continuing to the setup questions or directly into the section flow.
auditInfo.summaryDescription: These details are generated automatically from the current audit session.
auditInfo.title: Audit Information

preAudit.description: Capture season, weather, users present, user count, age groups, and place size before section scoring.
preAudit.preparingMessage: Loading the pre-audit questions and any saved draft values...
preAudit.subtitle: Complete the first-page context questions before moving through the section pages.
preAudit.title: Pre-Audit Setup

spaceAudit.intro: This step is shown only when the selected execution mode includes the onsite audit. Complete the current context questions before opening the section pages.
spaceAudit.matrixHeading: Describe users currently in the playspace
spaceAudit.preparingMessage: Loading the onsite setup questions and any saved answers...
spaceAudit.sidebarDescription: These questions shape the onsite context before the main section scoring begins.
spaceAudit.skipForSurveyMessage: Your selected execution mode does not include the onsite audit step. Continue directly to the sections.
spaceAudit.subtitle: Capture the onsite context that only an auditor can answer at the playspace.
spaceAudit.title: Space Audit Setup

section.followUpHidden: Diversity, Sociability, and Challenge appear only after a positive Provision answer.
section.incompleteMessage: You haven't answered all required questions in this section.
section.submitBlockedMessage: All questions in every section must be answered before you can submit.
section.submitConfirmMessage: Once submitted, this audit cannot be edited. Make sure all answers are final before continuing.
section.notesDefault: Add any reflections or recommendations for this section.
section.pendingSync: Answers saved locally - will sync to the server when online.
section.preparingMessage: Loading the current section and any previously saved answers...
section.saveAndBackToPrevious: Save and back to previous section

table.followUpPending: Choose a positive provision answer to unlock this scale.
